text.message: Sorry, 3 devs and the wheat is the only you have one of
I didn’t even steal from you
I know. It wasn’t personal, I just thought you were that far ahead at the time
It’s not personal, but I can see you’re taking it that way which is fine
You have the best OWS and will have army
Not out of pettiness. Because I thought you were leading
Giving the game to blue in the process
You also have 4 even with those early blocks lol
And that’s without army which you’ll eventually have
But I’m glad that it really offended you
